svg.text: Metatron / Seraph AI Defense — Complete System Architecture (v7.0)
41 Backend Routers | 21 Services | 25 Core Modules | 41 Frontend Pages | 13 Agent Scripts | 12 Docker Services | 29 Security Monitors
L0 — Edge & Access (External Actors → System Entry Points)
L2 — API Surface (FastAPI Router Mesh — 41 Routers)
All routers mount under /api prefix. WebSocket on /ws. Agent telemetry on /api/unified/telemetry (POST), commands on /api/unified/agents/{id}/command.
L3 — Domain Security Services (21 Services + 25 Core Modules)
• agent_deployment — Auto-deploy agents to discovered devices
• identity, token_broker, policy_engine, tool_gateway — Zero Trust stack
• mcp_server, vector_memory, vns, vns_alerts — Advanced security
L4 — Unified Agent v2.0 Architecture (29 Security Monitors — 13,398 LOC)
• MonitorModule ABC — Base class for all monitors
unified_agent/server_api.py — REST API for local control
v2.0 Monitors (backend aggregation ready, frontend cards added):
L6 — Runtime & Execution Plane (Docker Compose — 12 Services)
Volumes: mongodb_data, mongodb_config, elasticsearch_data, ollama_data, trivy_cache, falco_data, suricata_logs, cuckoo_data, vpn_config, wireguard_config, certbot_webroot
Execution: T1059 (CLI), T1204 (User Exec) | Persistence: T1547 (Boot), T1543 (Service), T1546 (WMI), T1053 (Sched Task) | Privilege: T1134 (Token), T1548 (UAC Bypass)
Defense Evasion: T1055 (Injection), T1036 (Masquerading), T1562 (Impair), T1070 (Indicator Removal) | Credential: T1003 (Dumping), T1558 (Kerberos)
Discovery: T1082 (System), T1083 (File), T1518 (Software) | C2: T1071 (App Layer), T1573 (Encrypted) | Impact: T1486 (Ransomware), T1490 (Shadow Copy)
Generated: v7.0 — Complete System Architecture | unified_agent/core/agent.py: 13,398 LOC | backend/: 41 routers, 21 services, 25 modules | frontend/: 41 pages
Docker: 12 services | Scripts: 13 agent variants | Browser Extension: Chrome/Firefox/Edge | Mobile: Android Termux, iOS Pythonista
